programme.desc: Bluster tries to impress Candy by getting a ridiculous toupee, but when that doesn't work, he tries to steal the Crystal Coconut. Meanwhile, King K. Rool tries to build a spy satellite.

programme.title: SONIC X Beating Eggman Part 2
programme.desc: Sonic saves Tails and Chris from E-51 while Eggman makes off with the Chaos Emerald. At Eggman's base, Knuckles appears and helps Rouge plant explosives but they end up being trapped!

programme.title: Roblox Rumble Roblox Rumble
programme.desc: Kidaverse Roblox Rumble - Season 3

programme.title: Roblox Rumble Roblox Rumble
programme.desc: Kidaverse Roblox Rumble - Season 3

programme.title: Donkey Kong Country Kong for a Day
programme.desc: When King K. Rool and his cronies framed Donkey Kong for wrongdoing with his friends, it works even better than they expected Cranky banishes Donkey Kong to the White Mountains and Diddy replaces him to become the future ruler.

programme.title: SONIC X That's What Friends Are for
programme.desc: Sonic decides to take his new friend Helen to pick flowers instead of attending the President's party he was invited to. The President's aide responds by sending a military unit to capture Sonic!

programme.title: Roblox Rumble Roblox Rumble
programme.desc: Kidaverse Roblox Rumble - Season 3

programme.title: Missing Teddy
programme.desc: Bean discovers that, in the world of organised crime, a teddy isn't always a teddy. Sometimes it's a rabbit.

programme.title: No Parking
programme.desc: Mr Bean can't find a parking space. So he makes one of his own.

programme.title: Bean's Bounty
programme.desc: Whilst digging for buried treasure, Mr Bean digs himself a hole too deep to get out of.

programme.title: Artful Bean
programme.desc: Mr Bean gets a real bug for painting. Then several bugs… and flies and slugs and mice.

programme.title: The Fly
programme.desc: Bean fights a loosing battle with a winged beast from Hell.

programme.title: Spring Clean
programme.desc: Mr Bean finds that cleanliness can be a filthy business.

programme.title: No Pets
programme.desc: His landlady smells a fish when Mr Bean gets a bird.

programme.title: A Ray of Sunshine
programme.desc: Sunbathing proves a more strenuous pursuit for Mr Bean.

programme.title: Birthday Bear
programme.desc: Mr Bean forgets his teddy's Birthday - then gives him a treat to remember.

programme.title: The Mole
programme.desc: Mr Bean loses control of a pest and makes a mountain out of a molehill.

programme.title: Roadworks
programme.desc: Mr Bean is driven to distraction by diabolical decibels.

programme.title: The Sofa
programme.desc: Mr Bean finds himself with more than a spring in his step.

programme.title: Treasure!
programme.desc: A puzzling puzzle has Mr Bean truly puzzled.

programme.title: Homeless
programme.desc: Mr Bean needs to let a room but no one will let him.

programme.title: Camping
programme.desc: Mr Bean discovers the great outdoors is not always so great.

programme.title: Chocks Away
programme.desc: Mr Bean's hobby goes down in flames in his battle for air supremacy.

programme.title: Royal Bean
programme.desc: During a visit to Buckingham Palace, Mr Bean meets the lady of the house.

programme.title: Young Bean
programme.desc: Mr Bean takes a trip down Memory Lane.

programme.title: In the Pink
programme.desc: Mr Bean, badgered by a strange pink animal, warms to the creature when it shows its true colours.

programme.title: Dinner For Two
programme.desc: When invited to dinner by Mr Bean, it's probably best to take your own sandwiches.

programme.title: The Ball
programme.desc: Mr Bean makes it to the top of the ladder… and gets stuck.

programme.title: Toothache
programme.desc: Mr Bean bites off more than he can chew when he attempts DIY dentistry.

programme.title: Haircut
programme.desc: Mr Bean has a bad hair day.

programme.title: Neighbourly Bean
programme.desc: Bean's pursuit of a quiet life ends in a major row.

programme.title: Nurse!
programme.desc: Mr Bean discovers being in hospital isn't always a bed of roses.

programme.title: Dead Cat
programme.desc: Mr Bean has to replace his landlady's cat after an unfortunate ‘accident'.

programme.title: Super-Trolley
programme.desc: Mr Bean builds a supermarket super trolley.

programme.title: Magpie
programme.desc: Mr Bean gets in a complete flap when he befriends a feathered thief.

programme.title: Aliens in the Attic
programme.desc: An adventure/comedy about kids on a family vacation who must fight off an attack by knee-high alien invaders with world-destroying ambitions. At the same time the youngsters try to keep their parents in the dark about the battle upstairs.

programme.title: MVP II: Most Vertical Primate
programme.desc: After being booted from his hockey team, Jack hits the road and meets Ben, a skateboarder with big dreams. Turns out Jack also has some impressive skater skills and the two set out on an hilarious cross-country skate tour!

programme.title: Alvin and the Chipmunks: The Squeakquel
programme.desc: The world famous singing pre-teen chipmunk trio return to contend with the pressures of school, celebrity, and a rival female music group known as The Chipettes.

programme.title: K-9: Legend of the Lost Gold
programme.desc: When Kassie and her friends stumble across an old, broken pocket watch they begin an unexpected journey to unlock the secret of the legendary Garrison Gold. They'll have to solve riddles and follow clues to find the lost treasure. Kassie is about to go on the adventure of a lifetime!

programme.title: Dogtanian and the Three Muskehounds
programme.desc: Dogtanian is an ambitious young swordsman who dreams of becoming a hero and joining the legendary Muskehounds. After proving his skills and earning their trust, he and the three Muskehounds must defend the King from the villainous Cardinal Richelieu's secret plot to seize power.

programme.title: Dough
programme.desc: Dough is a London-based comedic drama about the unlikely friendship between an old Jewish baker trying to save his family business and a young Muslim refugee from Darfur trying to help his mother by selling cannabis on the side.

programme.title: The Voices
programme.desc: Jerry is a chipper guy working at a local bathtub factory. With the help of his psychiatrist, he pursues his office crush. However, the relationship takes a murderous turn after she stands him up for a date.

programme.title: Home Sweet Hell
programme.desc: Don Champage is a successful businessman who seems to have it all--including an obsessive wife who relentlessly controls everything in his life

programme.title: The Sweetest Thing
programme.desc: When it comes to dating, Christina Walters (Cameron Diaz) has a golden rule: avoid searching for Mr. Right and focus on Mr. Right Now. That is, until one night at a club, when she unexpectedly meets Peter (Thomas Jane), only to find the next day that he has disappeared.

programme.title: Seraphim Falls
programme.desc: At the end of the Civil War, a colonel hunts down a man with whom he had a grudge. Starring Liam Neeson and Pierce Brosnan (2006).

programme.title: The Ballad of Lefty Brown
programme.desc: An aging gunslinger sets out to avenge his friend who is murdered in cold blood. Starring Bill Pullman, Peter Fonda and Jim Caviezel (2017).

programme.title: King of Texas
programme.desc: A Western remake of King Lear, John Lear a wealthy cattle-baron has to deal with the betrayal of his family before he can settle his own affairs. Starring Patrick Stewart (2001).

programme.title: Last Days Of Frank and Jesse James, The
programme.desc: A western about the notorious bank robbers, Frank and Jesse James

programme.title: A Hologram for the King
programme.desc: A Hologram for the King follows businessman Alan Clay (Tom Hanks) on a journey halfway around the world, far from his American roots, to a rising Saudi Arabian city.

programme.title: Faster
programme.desc: An ex-con sets out to avenge his brother's death after they were double-crossed during a heist years ago. During his campaign, however, he's tracked by a veteran cop and an egocentric hit man.

programme.title: The One
programme.desc: In a stunning dual role, international action star Jet Li portrays Gabriel Yulaw, a police officer confronted with a sinister form of himself escaped from an advanced, parallel universe and intent onkilling Gabriel.

programme.title: Walking Tall
programme.desc: When it comes to laying down the law, one man can make a difference! Action superstar Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson takes no prisoners as he fights for justice and crushes corruption in this story of one man who takes a stand…and takes back his town!

programme.title: Redline
programme.desc: For Fast and Furious junkies - time to put the pedal to the metal in this supercharged auto thriller, starring Eddie Griffin and Nathan Phillips! With the speedometer maxed out, a group of exotic car fanatics hit the streets in hopes of winning a life-changing sum of 24 million dollars. Every rule is broken as these drivers will do whatever it takes to win.

programme.title: Dangerous Mind of a Hooligan
programme.desc: Five criminals unknown to each other are hired to complete a bank robbery. What should have been a smooth operation soon descends into paranoia, violence and horror.

programme.title: Butchers
programme.desc: A family of sadistic butchers has dug into the back country and, from the deep freeze of winter to the dog days of summer, anyone who crosses their path is dead meat.

programme.title: The Last Legion
programme.desc: As the Roman empire collapses, young Romulus Augustus must leave the city and set out for a dangerous journey to Britain to locate his last legion of supporters.

programme.title: Out of the Furnace
programme.desc: When Rodney Baze mysteriously disappears and law enforcement doesn't follow through fast enough, his older brother Russell takes matters into his own hands to find justice.

programme.title: The Negotiator
programme.desc: The tables turn when a seasoned hostage negotiator takes hostages and risks all to prove his own innocence.

programme.title: American Assassin
programme.desc: A CIA black-ops recruit uses his lethal skills to try and stop a rogue operative with a deadly agenda.

programme.title: Crank: High Voltage
programme.desc: In a chase through Los Angeles, Chev pursues a Chinese mobster who has stolen his nearly indestructible heart.
A man who specialises in debunking paranormal occurrences checks into fabled room 1408 in the Dolphin Hotel.

programme.title: Pulse 2: Afterlife
programme.desc: Ghosts invade the human world, so a father must protect his daughter from the psychotic spirit of his ex-wife.

programme.title: Deadly Target
programme.desc: When Special Operative James Webster (Michael Jai White, The Dark Knight, Blood and Bone) returns home from duty to find his brother brutally murdered, his lethal training immediately kicks in. Fuelled by rage and a burning need to avenge his brother, he sets out to hunt down the perpetrators and nothing is going to stand in his way... As he delves deeper to identify the murderers, he finds himself at the centre of a deadly conspiracy and a secret world of corruption one which cuts deep inside the U.S. Government, reaching the very highest levels of command. With a ruthless military assassin (Steve Austin, The Expendables) hot on his trail, Webster must expose the corrupt high-ranking officials before he becomes another victim to the very plot which killed his brother.

programme.title: Landmine Goes Click
programme.desc: Tense thriller starring Spencer Locke, Sterling Knight and Dean Geyer. Three American tourists are backpacking through the remote countryside of European Georgia when one of them gets trapped on an armed landmine. That seems to be a minor threat compared to the nightmarish happenings the rest of the afternoon will bring on however. A psychopath takes advantage of the tourist's immobility and brutally assaults the woman he loves.

programme.title: I Spit On Your Grave: Deja Vu
programme.desc: Finally, after 1978's I Spit On Your Grave shocked the world with its story of a beautiful career woman assaulted and left for dead, and her notorious revenge on those responsible, cinema's most lethal Lady Vengeance returns in the most anticipated sequel of all time. Reuniting star Camille Keaton and original director Meir Zarchi, I Spit On Your Grave: Deja Vu sends now successful writer Jennifer Hills hurtling back to where it all began - to face the wrath of the families of those she murdered. Kidnapped along with her daughter Christy, it's a tense game of hunt - or be hunted - against a ruthless gang of degenerates and their violently unhinged matriarch, Becky. Hailed as a feminist revenge masterpiece by some, and misunderstood as crude exploitation by others, revenge is about to come full circle in Deja Vu, the final chapter in cinema's most shocking cult franchise.

programme.title: Let Me In
programme.desc: A haunting and provocative thriller written and directed by Matt Reeves (Cloverfield), based on the best-selling Swedish novel (Let the Right One In). Chlo Grace Moretz (Hit Girl in Kick-Ass) stars as Abby, a mysterious girl who moves next door to Owen (Kodi Smit-McPhee, The Road), a social outcast who is viciously bullied at school. In his loneliness, Owen forms a profound bond with Abby, but as a string of grisly murders grips his wintry New Mexico town, he begins to realise that Abby is anything but 'the girl next-door'.

programme.title: Savage Justice
programme.desc: Newly engaged Shelby John (Jack Huston) and Ruby Red want a fresh start after their struggles with addiction, but when Shelby discovers his beloved Ruby dead on their porch, he embarks on a vengeful killing spree of the dealers who supplied her. Armed with nothing but adrenaline and a nail gun, Shelby begins to unleash chaos on the towns criminal underbelly, as he hunts down crime lord Coyote (Quavo). Sheriff Church (Robert De Niro) must race against the clock to put an end to Shelby's vigilante justice before the entire town descends into a bloodbath

programme.title: Vanquish
programme.desc: Morgan Freeman and Ruby Rose lead in this non-stop actioner from the director of Bad Boys. A retired, crooked police commissioner - Damon Hickley blackmails his caretaker - Victoria by kidnapping her daughter and forces her to help him double cross his former team of dirty cops. Victoria is forced to fight her way through drug dealers and underworld thugs in a bid to save her child.

programme.title: Death Trench
programme.desc: In the final days of WWI a shell-shocked tunneller leads an Allied team into a hidden German base... one hundred feet below the trenches. The Germans have lost control of a highly contagious biological weapon that turns its victims into deranged killers. The Allies find themselves trapped underground with hordes of the infected, a rapidly spreading disease and a team of German Stormtroopers dispatched to clean up the mess

programme.title: St Agatha
programme.desc: St Agatha is a twisted horror thriller which pushes the boundaries of the nunsploitation genre from Darren Lynn Bousman, the director of Saw II, III and IV. In 1950s Georgia, a pregnant con woman on the run seeks refuge in a desolate convent only to be met with an unsettling and horrendous evil waiting on the other side. Enter this convent at your own risk!

programme.title: Angelica
programme.desc: Director of cult classic Teeth, brings James Norton, Janet McTeer, Jena Malone and Ed Stoppard to this unnerving, supernatural horror, set in Victorian England. Following the birth of their daughter, a young couple begin to experience strange happenings in their home. When the eerie late-night visits become ever more menacing, they decide to fight the supernatural force. Prepare to be spooked!

programme.title: Love In Translation
programme.desc: Sparks begin to fly between a Linguistics Ph.D. student and her French student. Starring Michelle Argyris (2021)

programme.title: Finding Mr. Right
programme.desc: When popular love and relationship podcaster and future author, Nikki Parsons is dumped by her boyfriend the day before she meets her new publisher, she has to think fast.

programme.title: The Soulmate Search
programme.desc: When Elen gets the chance to sign up to the notoriously exclusive dating service Eternity, she clashes with Will, her first date. They make a deal to try and get their money back.

programme.title: Love Strikes Twice
programme.desc: A woman is hit by a car while on her way to drop off divorce papers. When she wakes up without any memory, her husband is determined to recapture her heart. Stars Katrina Begin, Tilky Jones (2017)

programme.title: Raise a Glass to Love
programme.desc: An aspiring Master Sommelier Jenna returns to her family vineyard and is fascinated by the natural methods of the new winemaker. Starring Laura Osnes (2021)

programme.title: Love on Harbor Island
programme.desc: When Seattle interior designer Lily Summers returns to her hometown to help her Aunt Maggie run her marina-side bed and breakfast, she meets Marcus, the handsome seaplane pilot whose life's work delivering rescue dogs helps Lily discover that home really is where the heart is.

programme.title: Breaking Fast
programme.desc: Mo, a practicing Muslim living in West Hollywood, is learning to navigate life post heartbreak. Enter Kal, an All-American guy who surprises Mo by offering to break fast with him during the holy month of Ramadan.

programme.title: Blind
programme.desc: Bestselling novelist, Bill Oakland loses his wife and his sight in a vicious car crash. Five years later Socialite Suzanne Dutchman is forced to read to Bill in an intimate room three times a week as a plea bargain for being associated with her husband's insider trading.

programme.title: Accidental Love
programme.desc: A small town waitress gets a nail accidentally lodged in her head causing unpredictable behavior that leads her to Washington, D.C., where sparks fly when she meets a clueless young senator who takes up her cause - but what happens when love interferes with what you stand for?

programme.title: Dream Girl
programme.desc: A young engaged man on the verge of success meets a beautiful woman he can inexplicably connect with in his dreams. Starring: Skyler Caleb, Meg Cionni, Tim Daly

programme.title: Couples Vacation
programme.desc: When Jack and Amanda head off on a glamping trip to "reignite their spark", their blissful romantic getaway is rudely hijacked and they are left in more trouble than before!

programme.title: Accidentally In Love
programme.desc: Edie finds true love in London just days before she is to return to the US. They are separated, but as fate would have it, they reunite 6 years later in the US.

programme.title: Elsa And Fred
programme.desc: A withdrawn senior experiences life in new ways when he begins spending time with the free-spirited woman who lives across the hall. Starring: Shirley MacLaine, Christopher Plummer, Marcia Gay Harden

programme.title: You Stupid Man
programme.desc: A writer struggles to deal with the break-up with his girlfriend. It does not help with getting her out of his mind that she recently became a famous TV start.

programme.title: Love's Portrait
programme.desc: Lily, a museum curator, discovers a painting that looks just like her and is sent to find where the painting came from and who painted it. She tracks the painting down to the post office it was sent from in Ireland. There she meets William and Saoirse, a brother-sister duo who run the post, and who offer her help and friendship on her quest. But William knows more than he's letting on. Will he reveal what he knows if it risks his growing relationship--and mutual love--with Lily?

programme.title: Love at First Lie
programme.desc: When Sarah Goldman, a lovely young school teacher in Chicago, wants to please her parents, she invents a boyfriend whom she believes will be the man of her mother's dreams. When her parents insist on meeting the man, Sarah hires Bob, an actor, to pretend to be her "beau". The masquerade works flawlessly for a time and brings comic situations, but in the end, their lives are irrevocably changed.

programme.title: How to Train Your Husband
programme.desc: A marriage counselor attempts to fix her own marriage by focusing on how to change her husband.

programme.title: Love On Harbor Island
programme.desc: Interior designer Lily returns home to help her Aunt Maggie run her marina-side bed and breakfast when she meets Marcus, a handsome seaplane pilot whose work delivering rescue dogs helps Lily discover that home really is where the heart is.

programme.title: Love Finds You in Sugarcreek
programme.desc: A father and son fleeing a shocking and brutal tragedy settle in the predominantly Amish town of Sugarcreek, Ohio. They are taken in by three sisters who offer the father work as a handyman, but a local policewoman begins to become suspicious of his past.

programme.title: Pastor Brown
programme.desc: A preacher's daughter returns home to take over as pastor of the family church.

programme.title: Lovely Little Liars
programme.desc: A high school history teacher's perfect life is disrupted by a sex scandal.

programme.title: The Preacher's Mistress
programme.desc: Gwen Griffith is a single mom studying for her insurance license, amidst work.

programme.title: Sinister Minister
programme.desc: True story: Single mother Trish falls for DJ, unaware he's a serial wife killer.

programme.title: Pastor Brown
programme.desc: A preacher's daughter returns home to take over as pastor of the family church.

programme.title: Sisters of the Groom
programme.desc: Jason ropes his neighbor Sarah into pretending to be his girlfriend for his brother's wedding but his prying sisters suspect something is amiss.

programme.title: Aberrant
programme.desc: Cole (Jack Quaid) stirs everyone up during his best friend's wedding as something seems off between him and the bride.

programme.title: Eat, Drink and be Married
programme.desc: Billie helps save a wedding—and maybe finds love herself—in this charming romantic twist!

programme.title: The House Bunny
programme.desc: The story of a Playboy Bunny who teaches an awkward sorority about the opposite sex - only to learn that what boys really like is what's on the inside.

programme.title: The Big Hit
programme.desc: The criminal anarchy is hilarious when a foursome of full-time hit men looking to score extra cash kidnaps the boss' goddaughter. And when beleaguered wise guy Mel is set up to take the fall, underworld antics and domestic absurdities collide for a working weekend no one will soon forget. Mark Wahlberg, Lou Diamond Phillips, Christina Applegate, Bokeem Woodbine and Antonio Sabato, Jr. star in this explosive action comedy.

programme.title: Rock The Kasbah
programme.desc: ROCK THE KASBAH is the story of 'Richie Vance,' a has-been rock manager who takes his last remaining client on a USO tour of Afghanistan. When Richie finds himself in Kabul, abandoned, penniless and without his passport, he discovers a young girl with an extraordinary voice and manages her through Afghanistan's version of 'American Idol', the wildly popular 'Afghan Star'.

programme.title: Saving Silverman
programme.desc: Two friends try anything to keep their buddy and bandmate from marrying the wrong woman.

programme.title: Mackenzie's Raiders EP09-12
programme.desc: Colonel Mackenzie, commander of the 4th Cavalry Regiment at Fort Clark near Brackettville in Kinney County in southwest Texas during the 1870s, receives secret orders from President Ulysses S. Grant and Secretary of War William W. Belknap to stop bandits from crossing the Rio Grande into the United States, or from returning to Mexico.

programme.title: Rustlers on Horseback
programme.desc: The people around the town of Sloan Junction think that George Parradine is just a harmless book salesman, but he heads a gang of crooks planning to rob and pillage on a large scale.

programme.title: The Sundowners
programme.desc: Brother is pitted against brother in this tale of feuding ranchers in the Old West.

programme.title: Murieta!
programme.desc: The story of Joaquin Murrieta, a real life Mexican bandit who terrorized California with his gang of raiders and cutthroats during the first half of the 19th century. Some saw him as a murderous outlaw, others as the Mexican Robin Hood.

programme.title: Long and the Short and the Tall
programme.desc: The tragic story of seven British soldiers who, trapped behind Japanese lines, are so concerned with arguing out their own destinies that the enemy has to take second place.

programme.title: Pink String and Sealing Wax
programme.desc: In 1890's Brighton, the young son of a puritanical chemist longs to escape the repressive environment of his family life and the overbearing restraints of his cruel, pious father. Eventually finding refuge in a local tavern, he is immediately attracted to the sordid glamour of the drinking classes and the gritty world that they inhabit. He also finds himself becoming infatuated with the tavern's landlady, which will inadvertently lead to him being drawn into a plot to kill her abusive husband. Directed by Robert Hamer (Kind Hearts and Coronets, School For Scoundrels), Pink String and Sealing Wax stars Googie Withers (The Lady Vanishes), Mervyn Johns (Dead of Night) and Gordon Jackson (Whisky Galore! / The Quatermass Experiment) in a film that cleverly entwines the dynamics of a thriller with biting social commentary and a multi-layered plot structure that contrasts the parallels of the British class system.

programme.title: This Sporting Life
programme.desc: Richard Harris gives a great performance as a man who wants to quit his job as a miner.

programme.title: Dangerous Exile
programme.desc: The young Dauphin of France takes refuge in a Welsh town during the French Revolution.

programme.title: Above the Shadows
programme.desc: 'Above the Shadows' is a magic realism tale about a young woman who has faded to the point of becoming invisible and must find her way back into the world.

programme.title: Earthling
programme.desc: After a mysterious atmospheric event, a small group of people wake up to realize that their entire lives have been a lie. They are in fact aliens disguised as humans. Now they have to make a choice. Live amongst men, or try to find a way back home.

programme.title: Automata
programme.desc: Fast forward fifty years into the future, planet earth is in the midst of gradual desertification. Mankind struggles to survive as the environment deteriorates and the slow regression of the human race begins in AUTÓMATA.

programme.title: KIN
programme.desc: KIN, a pulse-pounding crime thriller with a sci-fi twist, is the story of an unexpected hero destined for greatness. Chased by a vengeful criminal and a gang of otherworldly soldiers, a recently released ex-con and his adopted teenage brother are forced to go on the run with a weapon...

programme.title: The Air I Breathe
programme.desc: (2007) Crime drama with Brendan Fraser. Visions, threats, desperate measures, and high-stakes gambles intertwine in this white-knuckle thriller that never stops for breath.

programme.title: Drive
programme.desc: Stuntman by day, getaway driver by night, the mysterious Driver must put his skills to the test when he chooses to help his neighbour and her shady husband. Stars Ryan Gosling (2011)

programme.title: Deadly Hope
programme.desc: An obstetrician's fertility-clinic partner and former lover is brutally murdered. After another man is murdered, she realises that she is the real target. Starring Alana De La Garza (2012)

programme.title: Wandering Eye
programme.desc: A neglected woman considers an affair with another man only for him to found dead in his hotel room. Starring Amanda Righetti (2011)

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: The Water Margin
programme.desc: Nearly a thousand years ago in ancient China, there was a cruel government. 108 renegade will try to change the story.

programme.title: The Water Margin
programme.sub-title: Liang Shan Po and the Millionaire
programme.desc: Nearly a thousand years ago in ancient China, there was a cruel government. 108 renegade will try to change the story.

programme.title: The Water Margin
programme.desc: Nearly a thousand years ago in ancient China, there was a cruel government. 108 renegade will try to change the story.

programme.title: The Water Margin
programme.desc: Nearly a thousand years ago in ancient China, there was a cruel government. 108 renegade will try to change the story.

programme.title: The International
programme.desc: An Interpol agent (Owen) attempts to expose a high-profile financial institution's role in an international arms dealing ring.

programme.title: Resident Evil: Extinction
programme.desc: Milla Jovovich is back to kill more zombies in the third chapter of the hit Resident Evil franchise! An action/horror film filled with huge special effects and edge-of-your-seat terror! Survivors of the Raccoon City catastrophe travel across the Nevada desert, hoping to make it to Alaska. Alice (Jovovich) joins the caravan and their fight against the evil Umbrella Corp.

programme.title: Resident Evil: Extinction
programme.desc: Milla Jovovich is back to kill more zombies in the third chapter of the hit Resident Evil franchise! An action/horror film filled with huge special effects and edge-of-your-seat terror! Survivors of the Raccoon City catastrophe travel across the Nevada desert, hoping to make it to Alaska. Alice (Jovovich) joins the caravan and their fight against the evil Umbrella Corp.

programme.title: Starship Troopers 2: Hero Of The Federation
programme.desc: A small group of troopers find themselves taking refuge in an abandoned outpost as they attempt to fight the encroaching arachnids - not realizing that a much graver danger is actually infiltrating their unit.

programme.title: Risen
programme.desc: RISEN is the epic Biblical story of the Resurrection, as told through the eyes of a non-believer. Clavius, a powerful Roman military tribune, and his aide, Lucius, are tasked with solving the mystery of what happened to Jesus in the weeks following the crucifixion.

programme.title: Blue Ruin
programme.desc: This critically acclaimed indie gem follows Dwight, a mysterious drifter whose quiet life is turned upside down when he learns that the man who murdered his parents is being released from prison.

programme.title: Red Corner
programme.desc: In this provocative thriller, an American (Richard Gere) on a business trip in China is framed for a brutal murder and soon finds himself at the mercy of a foreign court system he doesn't understand. Can he find the true killer before it's too late?

programme.title: Professor Marston & The Wonder Women
programme.desc: PROFESSOR MARSTON & THE WONDER WOMEN is based on the extraordinary true story of the creator of one of the most iconic super heroes ever conceived, and the seductive secret life he kept from his fans.

programme.title: Hollywood Homicide
programme.desc: A pair of detectives investigate the murder of a rap group while pursuing their other full-time professions.
